subcodes.first_line: The Almighty beareth witness that there is none other God besides Him. He hath ever dwelled in the sublime realm of majesty and might
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان فی علو العظمه و الاقتدار و سمو الرفعه و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
